failures.claim: Self-repair outcome taxonomy from scripts/analysis/selfrepair_analysis.py includes first_attempt_pass and persistent_fail
failures.expected: selfrepair_analysis.py uses categories: first_attempt_pass, full_repair, partial_repair, regression, persistent_fail
failures.actual: selfrepair_analysis.py:classify_repair() uses: full_repair, partial_repair, regression, no_repair. The terms 'first_attempt_pass' and 'persistent_fail' do not appear in the code; 'no_repair' is used instead of 'persistent_fail' and 'first_attempt_pass' is not a classify_repair return value
